title: Chat Logger!
description: Chatlogger mod! Logs your chat! Both player and system events are logged in a .txt file, separated by server IP!
body:
#  Chat Logger Starlight

Never lose an important message again! **Chat Logger Starlight** automatically saves 
everything from your Minecraft chat into neat, organized text files — completely in 
the background with zero effort from you.

##  Features

-  **Per-server folders** — each server gets its own folder named after its IP, so 
everything stays organized
-  **Timestamped sessions** — every time you join a server, a new log file is created 
with the exact date and time
-  **Captures everything** — player messages, death messages, join/leave notices, 
server broadcasts, all of it
-  **Completely silent** — no chat spam, no GUI, just works in the background!
  
-  **Lightweight** — tiny mod with no performance impact

## Where are my logs?

Your logs are saved in your minecraft folder, under 'chat_logs/', organized by server IP!

For issues concerning the mod, DM [@Vinh.Starlight](https://discord.com/users/997753960117047347) on discord!
